jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Croma
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Croma in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
